message: [1]: Lost job, but planning to start a new business.
raw_message: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.

message: [3]: The user is starting a dance studio due to their enthusiasm for dancing.
raw_message: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
reason: The user's passion for dancing and desire to share it with others

attribue: Dancing is a source of joy for user
message: [5]: The user plans to open a dance studio to share their passion for dancing with others.
raw_message: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
reason: To share the joy of dancing with others

message: [7]: The user shares their preference for contemporary dance.
raw_message: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
reason: The author loves contemporary dance for its expressiveness and power

attribue: user likes the sound of fun classes
message: [9]: The user suggests going to a dance class for fun.
raw_message: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
reason: The idea of going to a dance class is seen as an enjoyable activity.

message: [11]: The user is excited to perform next Friday.
raw_message: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!

attribue: author is enthusiastic , author like dance
fact: the person attend a dance performance with an image of man in suit and performs a dance
message: [13]: The user excited about attending concert event
raw_message: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great! (image description: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance)
reason: .It will be great to watch the performance.

attribue: user enthusiastic about sharing their dancing with others
message: [15]: The user shares a photo from winning a local competition and expresses enthusiasm for spreading the excitement, while also inquiring about Gina's experience in similar events.
raw_message: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
reason: to share the excitement of winning a local comp

message: [17]: The user expresses their positive emotions after winning a competition.
raw_message: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
reason: Winning first place was an achievement

message: [19]: The user shares a photo of their ideal dance studio, expressing admiration for its location.
raw_message: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water. (image description: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats)
reason: The reviewer is positive about the aesthetic appeal of the studio

message: [21]: The user searches for a place that will inspire them.
raw_message: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
reason: To find a new source of inspiration

fact: Rehearsed with small group after work
message: [23]: The user expresses excitement and joy about rehearsing for a dance performance.
raw_message: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait! (image description: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage)
reason: Excited about performances, getting to enjoy and explore many different styles of dances

message: [25]: The user is excited about the music performance at the festival.
raw_message: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
reason: Their practice and talent will make them impressive

raw_message: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

attribue: Owner is confident in her store
raw_message: Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.
reason: All hard work really paid off - Congrats!

attribue: Gina value aesthetics in finding a place for her dance studio
fact: looking for ideal dance studio location
message: [31]: Gina is searching for an ideal space for her dance studio.
raw_message: Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool. (image description: a photo of a bathroom with a blue floor and a pink wall)
reason: Looking at different places to find the perfect space

message: [33]: The user likes the downtown space due to its convenient location and natural light.
raw_message: It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely.

message: [35]: The user emphasizes the importance of good flooring, specifically highlighting Marley flooring's benefits for dance studios.
raw_message: Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.
reason: Marley flooring is suitable for dance studies due to its grip and ease of cleaning

attribue: user is positive about completing a project
fact: mix of exciting and nerve-wracking experiences
message: [37]: The user expresses determination and excitement about completing their project, mentioning that it has been both exciting and nerve-wracking.
raw_message: Yeah, can't wait to see it done! Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!
reason: Exciting and nerve-wracking experience due to the anticipation of seeing the project completed
